candidates.text: See, this is the nonsense that really gets me about ratings and gaming media. The original Halo is one of the highest rated games ever on Metacritic. How is it all the sudden an 8/10 or more laughably a 7/10 with a fresh coat of paint? Metroid Prime Remastered saw the same thing, only the score wasn’t as low. A better looking, better playing version of a god-tier game but NOW it’s not as good? FOH

candidates.text: Farmers are reporting that data centres are destroying their bees. I don't think people understand how important this is. Bees pollinate about one in every three bites of food we eat. They're far more important to humanity than any Al tool or data centre.
